title: leymus altus
intro: Leymus altus, also known as big blue grass or blue grama, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of the western United States and Canada. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and its antibacterial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Leymus altus include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve respiratory health due to its expectorant properties. Leymus altus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues, including coughs, colds, and skin irritations.
